home.name: Raina DeJute
home.role: AI-native full-stack developer with a front-end heart
home.intro: Full-stack developer, front-end focused. I came up through human services before tech, and I bring that same discipline to delivery — shipping projects on time, scoped to what the client actually needs, not what's easy to build. React on the front, Spring Boot and Node behind it, AI-native from spec to ship.

tech.heading: What I build with
tech.intro: A pragmatic, full-stack toolkit — chosen to fit the problem, not to pad a résumé.

soft.heading: What I bring to a team
soft.intro: The human skills that came before the technical ones — and still lead the way.

why.heading: Why I Build
why.body: Before I wrote code, I spent years in human services — walking with people through recovery, crisis, and starting over. I learned to hear what someone needs before they can say it, and to build the conditions for them to feel safe. I do the same work now with different tools: I shape an interface the way I once arranged a room — so the person on the other side feels seen, and a little less stuck. That instinct is the throughline from who I was to what I build.
why.imageAlt: Warm illustration of two people connecting

frontend.title: React & React Native
frontend.desc: I build responsive, accessible interfaces in React — and take them cross-platform with React Native when a project needs to live on a phone.

backend.title: Spring Boot & Node
backend.desc: On the server I design APIs in Spring Boot and Node that are predictable, documented, and kind to the next developer.

data.title: SQL & MongoDB
data.desc: I model data in both relational SQL and document-based MongoDB, choosing the shape that fits the problem instead of forcing one.

ai.title: AI-native, spec-driven
ai.desc: I work spec-first with AI as a collaborator — writing clear specifications, then iterating on them so the code stays intentional, not improvised.

resilience.title: Resilience
resilience.desc: I've started over more than once and rebuilt with intention. Hard problems don't rattle me — they focus me.

communication.title: Communication
communication.desc: Years of sitting with people in hard conversations taught me to be clear, calm, and honest — to raise a blocker early and explain a tradeoff without the jargon.

accountability.title: Accountability
accountability.desc: I work AI-native, but I own every line. I read what I generate, make sure I understand it, and take responsibility for what ships. The tool accelerates me; it doesn't excuse me.

selfDirection.title: Self-direction
selfDirection.desc: I don't wait to be handed a problem. I built a crypto risk dashboard and a route-aware grocery tool on my own — because I saw a need and started.

portfolio.heading: Portfolio
portfolio.intro: Education, experience, and a few things I've built.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.intro: A mix of client-style builds and things I made because I saw a need.

coordinator.title: Student Success Coordinator
coordinator.desc: I support students through an intensive full-stack program — unblocking them technically and personally, tracking progress, and keeping momentum going when the work gets hard.

humanServices.title: Human Services
humanServices.org: Salvation Army (Resident Manager) · Volunteers of America (Peer Support Specialist)
humanServices.desc: Years walking alongside people in recovery and crisis: peer support, de-escalation, and leadership up to Resident Manager. I built daily routines and community structures that helped vulnerable residents feel safe and stay stable.

crypto.name: Crypto Analytics Dashboard
crypto.desc: A logarithmic-regression DCA risk model that scores the market from 0 to 1 — turning noisy price and sentiment data into a single signal a person can actually read before they buy.
crypto.alt: Screenshot of the crypto analytics risk dashboard

grocery.name: Route-Aware Grocery Tool
grocery.desc: Builds your grocery list, then sequences it to match the real walking path through the store — so you shop in one pass instead of doubling back.
grocery.alt: Illustration for the route-aware grocery shopping tool

rocket.name: Rocket Food Delivery (Mobile)
rocket.desc: A React Native app on Expo talking to a Spring Boot backend: sign-in, restaurant browsing, menus, and order navigation — my first full mobile stack, end to end.
rocket.alt: Screenshot of the Rocket Food Delivery mobile app

portfolio.name: This Portfolio
portfolio.desc: The site you're on — React + Vite, Supabase, and GitHub Actions, built AI-native and spec-first. Every feature started as a written spec before a line of code.

links.heading: Links
links.intro: Where to find me, and a couple of places that shaped how I think.

linkedin.title: LinkedIn
linkedin.desc: Connect with me professionally — my background, roles, and the human-services-to-developer story in full.

github.title: GitHub
github.desc: Browse the code behind my projects, including this portfolio.

youtube.title: YouTube
youtube.desc: Walkthrough videos for every module — solving LeetCode, explaining my code, and breaking down the concepts that trip people up.

codeboxx.title: CodeBoxx
codeboxx.desc: The full-stack program that shaped this chapter of my career — intensive, project-driven, and where this site was born.

cryptoverse.title: Into The Cryptoverse
cryptoverse.desc: Benjamin Cowen's data-driven crypto analysis — the analytical work that inspired my crypto risk dashboard.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.intro: Have a role, a project, or just want to say hello? Send a message — it lands straight in my inbox.
contact.imageAlt: Abstract illustration of a letter at the center of a warm, connected world
contact.unavailable: The contact form is temporarily unavailable. Please email me directly.

errors.name: Please enter your name.
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.

feedback.success: Message sent! Thanks — I'll get back to you soon.
feedback.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
